market_brief.AMZN: Big Spring Sale ends; stock pressure from AI capex/spending concerns vs long-term AWS/AI upside.
market_brief.INTC: New Core Ultra Series 3 launch (Dell/HP); supply constraints leading to CPU price hikes.
market_brief.AAPL: 50th anniversary; strong Q1/services revenue; product-heavy 2026/WWDC and AI talent catalysts.
